---
title: "About"
---

# 🌍 About Daho Wealth

<div class="glass-card">

## Financial & Economic Intelligence for Africa and Global Markets

Daho Wealth is a financial and economic intelligence platform focused on Africa, global markets, and the African diaspora.

We are building tools and analytical platforms that make stock market data, macroeconomic indicators, financial education, and investment research more accessible, transparent, and actionable.

Our long-term vision is to bridge critical financial and economic data gaps across emerging and frontier markets through technology, analytics, and education.

</div>

---

## Platform Focus

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 Africa-Focused

We prioritize African markets, regional economic intelligence, and opportunities across emerging economies.

Coverage begins with Benin and West Africa and gradually expands across the continent.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 📊 Data-Driven

Our platform combines:

- Financial market data
- Economic indicators
- Inflation tracking
- Market dashboards
- Company analysis
- Quantitative research tools

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🎯 Education First

We simplify complex financial and economic concepts for:

- Students
- Investors
- Entrepreneurs
- Researchers
- The African diaspora

</div>

</div>

---

## Mission

<div class="glass-card">

Our mission is to make institutional-grade financial education, stock market analytics, and economic intelligence accessible to Africans, the diaspora, and emerging-market investors worldwide.

We believe better access to financial information can unlock smarter investing, stronger businesses, and long-term economic empowerment.

</div>

---

## Vision

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth aims to become a leading African financial intelligence ecosystem combining:

- Market analytics
- Economic intelligence
- Financial research
- Educational tools
- Investment technology
- Data infrastructure

for the next generation of African and global investors.

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
